ddls:
CREATE TABLE "marine_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data entry */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the data collection in UTC */,
  "Hs" REAL /* Significant wave height in feet */,
  "Tp" REAL /* Wave period in seconds */,
  "Dp" INTEGER /* Wave direction in degrees */,
  "Ta" REAL /* Air temperature in Celsius */,
  "SST" REAL /* Sea surface temperature in Fahrenheit */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the site where the data was collected */,
  "data_interval" INTEGER /* Interval in minutes at which the data was collected */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data (e.g., buoy, ship, satellite) */,
  "data_status" TEXT /* Status of the data entry (e.g., raw, processed, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marine_data_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site (e.g., Coastal Monitoring Station 1) */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location of the site */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "depth" REAL /* Depth of the site (if applicable) */,
  "site_type" TEXT /* Type of site (e.g., coastal, offshore, deep sea) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., Wave Data, Temperature Data) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the data type */,
  "data_source_compatibility" TEXT /* Sources compatible with this data type (e.g., buoy, ship) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure storage */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string for the access request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES marine_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality assessment */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry being assessed */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score assigned to the data entry */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments regarding the quality assessment */,
  "assessor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the quality assessment */,
  "quality_timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the quality assessment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_assessor_id FOREIGN KEY ("assessor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "metadata" (
  "metadata_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metadata entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data entry the metadata pertains to */,
  "method" TEXT /* Description of the data collection method used */,
  "equipment" TEXT /* Equipment used for data collection */,
  "method_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data collection method */,
  "equipment_serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the equipment used */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date of the last calibration of the equipment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metadata_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version entry */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original data entry */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data entry */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "version_comments" TEXT /* Comments about the changes made in the version */,
  "version_creator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_creator_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_creator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
